## What is eWay-CRM?

eWay-CRM is a CRM that runs as a plugin directly inside Microsoft Outlook, so your reps never have to leave their inbox to manage contacts, deals, or projects. It stores the full communication history alongside CRM records and syncs with Microsoft Teams for team collaboration. An AI layer adds email tone analysis, task suggestions, and message summarization.

## Who is it for?

Businesses that are heavily invested in Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft 365 and want CRM functionality without forcing a tool switch. Particularly appealing to professional services firms, consultancies, and sales teams where Outlook is already the center of daily work.

## Strengths

- **Native Outlook integration** — CRM data lives alongside your email without switching apps.
- **Full communication history** — every email, note, and call log attached to contacts, companies, and deals automatically.
- **Teams collaboration** — shared email threads and discussions via Microsoft Teams integration.
- **Generous free plan** — unlimited users on the free tier with basic contact management.
- **3,000+ app integrations** — connects to QuickBooks, Mailchimp, Zapier, Adobe Sign, and more.

## What to consider

- Only useful if your team works in Outlook; non-Outlook users get no value from it.
- Pricing structure is modular per-team rather than per-user, which can be confusing to evaluate.
- Less polished than modern standalone CRMs when it comes to pipeline visualization and reporting.

## Bottom line

eWay-CRM is the pragmatic choice for Outlook-centric teams that want CRM without a migration. If your reps already live in Outlook and you're tired of asking them to use a separate tool, this eliminates that friction. For teams open to a standalone CRM, there are more capable options at similar price points.
